title: pelargonium × nervosum
intro: Pelargonium × nervosum, also known as Nervous Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the combination of Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium peltatum. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × nervosum include its ability to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
